name: devcycle
description: Opinionated pipeline from a feature, bug, or refactor description to a verified, publish-ready implementation: scoped interview, spec, wave-based plan, TDD subagent execution, branch review, on-device verification.

gitPolicy.description: What the finish stage may do with the branch: hand it back, push it, or push and open a PR.

modelLineup.description: Model per pipeline role; every dispatch passes its model explicitly.

reviewDepth.description: Branch review engine: single code-review pass plus spec-compliance layer, or the multi-lens review panel workflow.

crossModelReview.description: Add a cross-model lens to the review panel when available.

onDeviceGate.description: Whether a human must walk the on-device checklist or honestly-tagged auto verdicts may close it.
